title: [Panther's] Fresh Bricks & Polished
description: This mini pack re-textures all the bricks and polished textures I hope you like it :)
body:
### This pack is meant to be the final product. 

It's meant to act like a addon-type format.  

**I will be doing flowers next!**

If you want to add suggestions for texture ideas or any other ideas for resource packs feel free to let me know on my **discord:https://discord.gg/4XwYYfNS77**
Not _the livelyest_ of servers due to me really _not being there_, but if you care to join for a fun experience, feel free to come on by!

### Other packs I will be doing:
- **_Candels_**
- **_leaves_**
- **_Loggs/wood_**
- **_planks_**
- **_doors/trapdoors_**
- **_glass panes/blocks_**
- **_wool/concrete/terrocatta_**
